title: clerodendrum smitinandii
intro: Clerodendrum smitinandii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Thai glory bower. This plant is traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum smitinandii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or used in combination with other herbs to create a poultice or ointment for topical application.
